error_signature: 400 - type should not be empty, type must be a string
title: 1min.AI API request returns 400 Bad Request
symptom: The API request fails with a 400 Bad Request error, indicating that required parameters are missing or incorrectly formatted.
applies_when: Sending a request with JSON body
not_this_if: All required parameters are correctly included in the request
root_cause: The API requires specific parameters to be present in the request body. If the 'type' and 'model' parameters are missing or empty, the API will respond with a 400 error indicating that these fields must be provided as strings.
fix_steps: Ensure that both 'type' and 'model' parameters are included in the JSON body of the request.
Test the request again to confirm it is successful.
agent_instruction: Include 'type' and 'model' parameters in your API request and set the correct Content-Type header.
